description: Emit HK-0004 (architectural-discovery: in-repo sprint-workflow/SKILL.md missing Steps 0.5, 1d, 3d referenced by the Sprint 9 ported schema). Andon `alert` raised by architect, concurred by scope-guardian and henkaten-detector, resolved within takt budget. Runtime execution unaffected (cached v0.3.3 SKILL.md is what /trine-eval:harness-sprint actually loads). Recorded for follow-up sprint planning; auto-applied per minor-reversible single-prompt-equivalent path at L4 because (a) the henkaten-detector's classify-and-recommend protocol explicitly produced a fully-formed HK-0004 candidate, (b) emission is a jsonl append (reversible-with-caveat) within a council-write directory, and (c) the gap-detection process itself ran via the standard fan-out protocol with verification spot-check passing.
